steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage states Peru produced 0.38 million metric tons in 1995, which anchors you to Peru's row in the table. The question asks for Peru's production in 2020 — read the value where Peru's row meets the 2020 column.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 1.20 million metric tons of copper in 2020.: this is the 2020 figure for a different country in the table, not Peru. ✗
  • Choice B — 0.39 million metric tons of copper in 2020.: this is the 2020 figure for another country in the table, not Peru. ✗
  • Choice C — 2.15 million metric tons of copper in 2020.: this is the value in Peru's row under the 2020 column. ✓
  • Choice D — 0.73 million metric tons of copper in 2020.: this is the 2020 figure for yet another country in the table, not Peru. ✗
C is correct.
